title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Sports Authority India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Sports Authority India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Sports Authority India in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sports Authority India:
Sports Authority India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sports Authority India!
